requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——EN IEC 62133-2

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the EU market must comply with EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems). This standard is harmonised under the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU and the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 for portable battery safety. It covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge), and electrochemical performance limits. CE marking based on conformity with EN IEC 62133-2 is the standard route for portable batteries under 2 kg not covered by product-specific directives.
summary.zh: 在欧盟市场销售的便携式锂电芯及电池组须符合EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂体系）。该标准已在低压指令2014/35/EU及欧盟电池法规2023/1542框架下协调（用于便携式电池安全）。标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值。符合EN IEC 62133-2的CE标志，是2千克以下便携式电池（不受产品专项指令约束时）的标准路径。
summary.zht: 在歐盟市場銷售的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組須符合EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰體系）。該標準已在低壓指令2014/35/EU及歐盟電池法規2023/1542框架下協調（用於便攜式電池安全）。標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值。符合EN IEC 62133-2的CE標誌，是2千克以下便攜式電池（不受產品專項指令約束時）的標準路徑。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by EU Notified Bodies or under the EU LVD/Battery Regulation conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，在欧盟LVD/电池法规合格评定路径下不被公告机构认可。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，在歐盟LVD/電池法規合格評定路徑下不被公告機構認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 test reports from an EU-recognised laboratory (ILAC MRA-member lab with relevant scope, or a Notified Body). Existing GB 31241 test reports do not substitute. Key gaps: (1) test severity differences in crush and overcharge tests; (2) EU requires EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), CE marking, and Technical File; (3) Battery Regulation 2023/1542 adds labelling requirements (battery chemistry, capacity, QR code) that have no equivalent in Chinese domestic requirements for export.
gap.zh: 出口商须从欧盟认可实验室（具有相关范围的ILAC MRA成员实验室或公告机构）获取EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021检测报告，现有GB 31241检测报告不可替代。主要差距：（1）挤压和过充测试的严苛程度存在差异；（2）欧盟要求提供欧盟符合性声明（DoC）、CE标志及技术文件；（3）电池法规2023/1542增加了标签要求（电池化学体系、容量、QR码），在中国国内出口要求中无对应规定。
gap.zht: 出口商須從歐盟認可實驗室（具有相關範圍的ILAC MRA成員實驗室或公告機構）獲取EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021檢測報告，現有GB 31241檢測報告不可替代。主要差距：（1）擠壓和過充測試的嚴苛程度存在差異；（2）歐盟要求提供歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）、CE標誌及技術文件；（3）電池法規2023/1542增加了標籤要求（電池化學體系、容量、QR碼），在中國國內出口要求中無對應規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before EU market placement; EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 is the harmonised standard granting presumption of conformity under LVD 2014/35/EU and Battery Regulation 2023/1542
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU (and Battery Regulation 2023/1542 for portable batteries) is mandatory for EU market placement. EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 is the harmonised standard. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not satisfy the EU conformity assessment pathway; independent re-testing to EN IEC 62133-2 from an EU-recognised laboratory is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据LVD 2014/35/EU（以及便携式电池的电池法规2023/1542），CE标志为进入欧盟市场的强制要求。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021为适用协调标准。中国GB 31241认证不满足欧盟合格评定路径；须向欧盟认可实验室独立重新完成EN IEC 62133-2检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據LVD 2014/35/EU（以及便攜式電池的電池法規2023/1542），CE標誌為進入歐盟市場的強制要求。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021為適用協調標準。中國GB 31241認證不滿足歐盟合格評定路徑；須向歐盟認可實驗室獨立重新完成EN IEC 62133-2檢測。
